Home.subtitle: No servers. Full privacy. Everything runs in your browser.

bg-removal.name: Background Removal

svg.name: SVG Tools

color-converter.name: Color Converter

pdf.name: PDF Tools

spreadsheet.name: Spreadsheet Viewer
